summary: Base W9 — first post-deload step-up week. Template permanently changed 6/16 (Adj #92): Hyp A Wed→Tue, threshold Tue→Wed, Thu now off. Hill-stride debut clean Mon (Adj #91). Wed 4×8 @ T ran 7:45–7:52/mi at RIR 2–3 'almost too easy' with peak HR 190 = strongest run-MHR signal yet → owed standalone fresh-day max test rolls to W10 (Adj #9/#53/#93). Sat Hyp B logged fresh, long run PUNTED to Sun for an AM-sore Achilles that cleared pre-lift (Adj #104): calf 335 bump landed CLEAN with no Achilles during/post (Adj #102), lat 155 hold cleared → bump 160 (Adj #97); two fed-session resets — chest-supp row 85→75 (Adj #98) and preacher 65→60 (Adj #100). Tendons/SI otherwise clean all week (no SI, no knee issues Sat). Remaining: Sun = the punted long 60 Z1.

Permanently off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab
